steps.title: Multiply both sides by 5 to clear the fraction
steps.content: Start with $$\frac{4x}{5} = 20$$. Multiply both sides by 5 to eliminate the denominator: $$5 \cdot \frac{4x}{5} = 20 \cdot 5$$. This simplifies to $$4x = 100$$.

steps.title: Divide both sides by 4 to isolate x
steps.content: From $$4x = 100$$, divide both sides by 4: $$x = \frac{100}{4} = 25$$. That matches choice A — A is correct.
